name: Ether
description: Balanced output stage for Eurorack. Mono inputs normal to stereo, main and headphone levels are independent, and the module is calibrated for low-noise line and headphone duty.

controls.name: MAIN
controls.detail: independent volume control · calibrated for +10 dBu max

controls.name: PHONES
controls.detail: independent volume control · stereo headphone amp

inputs.name: MONO IN L
inputs.description: Main audio input. A mono source patched here is copied to the right channel when the right input is empty.

inputs.name: MONO IN R
inputs.description: Right audio input. Normalled to the left input when unpatched.

outputs.name: BAL OUT L
outputs.description: Balanced left line output for mixers, interfaces and long cable runs.

outputs.name: BAL OUT R
outputs.description: Balanced right line output for mixers, interfaces and long cable runs.

outputs.name: HEADPHONE OUT
outputs.description: Stereo headphone output with its own level control.

behaviors.name: Mono normaling
behaviors.description: The right input normalizes to the left, so a mono source becomes a stereo feed without a patch cable.

behaviors.name: Separate monitor levels
behaviors.description: The line outputs and headphone amplifier have separate level controls, so the monitor mix and cue mix can be trimmed independently.

behaviors.name: Balanced line drive
behaviors.trigger: route BAL OUT L/R to external gear
behaviors.description: The balanced outputs are tuned for studio and live audio gear, reducing hum and ground-loop issues over longer cable runs.

behaviors.name: Headphone alternate output
behaviors.trigger: use HEADPHONE OUT as a line tap
behaviors.description: The headphone amp can serve as a second stereo output when an alternate feed is useful.

behaviors.name: Input metering
behaviors.description: The two LEDs monitor the incoming level, giving a quick check for signal presence and overdrive without patching a meter.

patchIdeas.name: Direct studio feed
patchIdeas.patch: Patch a stereo mix into MONO IN L/R · set MAIN for interface headroom · send BAL OUT L/R to the audio interface or monitor controller · Ether becomes the rack-to-studio bridge.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ether:
* MAIN: set for +10 dBu
* PHONES: optional

Mixer:
Interface:

- Mixer (L) -> Ether (MONO IN L)
- Mixer (R) -> Ether (MONO IN R)
- Ether (BAL OUT L) -> Interface (In L)
- Ether (BAL OUT R) -> Interface (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Cue mix
patchIdeas.patch: Use the headphone output as a second stereo monitor feed · MAIN sends to front-of-house while PHONES drives a private cue mix for headphones or in-ear monitoring.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ether:
* MAIN: monitor level
* PHONES: cue level

Mixer:
Output:

- Mixer (L) -> Ether (MONO IN L)
- Mixer (R) -> Ether (MONO IN R)
- Ether (BAL OUT L) -> Output (Main L)
- Ether (BAL OUT R) -> Output (Main R)
- Ether (HEADPHONE OUT) -> Output (Phones)

patchIdeas.name: Mono synth to stereo rig
patchIdeas.patch: Feed a mono voice into the left input only · the right channel normaling copies it through · the resulting stereo feed lands in the DAW or a live mixer with one cable less.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ether:

VCO:
Filter:

- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In) -> Ether (MONO IN L)
- Ether (BAL OUT L) -> DAW (In L)
- Ether (BAL OUT R) -> DAW (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Pedal interface
patchIdeas.patch: Patch a modular voice into Ether and send the balanced outputs into a pedal chain or recording rig · the module provides the level matching and low-noise output stage needed for external processing.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ether:

VCO:
FX Pedal:
Output:

- VCO (Out) -> Ether (MONO IN L)
- Ether (BAL OUT L) -> FX Pedal (In)
- FX Pedal (Out) -> Ether (MONO IN R)
- Ether (HEADPHONE OUT) -> Output (Cue)
